mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM users WHERE DATE(created_at) = CURDATE()
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM learning_progress WHERE DATE(COALESCE(updated_at, created_at)) = CURDATE() OR DATE(completed_at) = CURDATE()
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM practice_submissions WHERE DATE(created_at) = CURDATE()
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM reports WHERE status = 'PENDING'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM users WHERE status = 'ACTIVE'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM users WHERE status = 'ACTIVE' AND DATE(created_at) = CURDATE()
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM exam_sessions WHERE submitted_at IS NOT NULL
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM exam_sessions WHERE submitted_at IS NOT NULL AND DATE(submitted_at) = CURDATE()
SELECT report_id, target_type, target_id, reason_code, status, created_at FROM reports ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 5
SELECT notice_id, title, status, created_at FROM notices ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 5

SELECT
DATE_FORMAT(days.activity_date, '%m월') AS label,
DATE_FORMAT(days.activity_date, '%m/%d') AS label,
COUNT(lp.progress_id) AS value, 0 AS percent FROM (
SELECT STR_TO_DATE(DATE_FORMAT(CURDATE(), '%Y-%m-01'), '%Y-%m-%d') AS activity_date UNION ALL SELECT DATE_SUB(STR_TO_DATE(DATE_FORMAT(CURDATE(), '%Y-%m-01'), '%Y-%m-%d'), INTERVAL 1 MONTH) UNION ALL SELECT DATE_SUB(STR_TO_DATE(DATE_FORMAT(CURDATE(), '%Y-%m-01'), '%Y-%m-%d'), INTERVAL 2 MONTH) UNION ALL SELECT DATE_SUB(STR_TO_DATE(DATE_FORMAT(CURDATE(), '%Y-%m-01'), '%Y-%m-%d'), INTERVAL 3 MONTH) UNION ALL SELECT DATE_SUB(STR_TO_DATE(DATE_FORMAT(CURDATE(), '%Y-%m-01'), '%Y-%m-%d'), INTERVAL 4 MONTH)
SELECT CURDATE() AS activity_date UNION ALL SELECT DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 1 DAY) UNION ALL SELECT DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 2 DAY) UNION ALL SELECT DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 3 DAY) UNION ALL SELECT DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 4 DAY)
) days LEFT JOIN learning_progress lp ON (
DATE_FORMAT(DATE(COALESCE(lp.updated_at, lp.created_at)), '%Y-%m') = DATE_FORMAT(days.activity_date, '%Y-%m')
DATE(COALESCE(lp.updated_at, lp.created_at)) = days.activity_date
) GROUP BY days.activity_date ORDER BY days.activity_date

SELECT s.subject_name AS label, COUNT(lp.progress_id) AS value, 0 AS percent FROM subjects s LEFT JOIN learning_progress lp ON s.subject_id = lp.subject_id AND ( lp.lesson_completed = 1 OR lp.practice_passed = 1 OR lp.completed_at IS NOT NULL ) AND DATE(COALESCE(lp.updated_at, lp.created_at)) >=
DATE_SUB(STR_TO_DATE(DATE_FORMAT(CURDATE(), '%Y-%m-01'), '%Y-%m-%d'), INTERVAL 4 MONTH)
DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 4 DAY)
WHERE s.is_active = 1 GROUP BY s.subject_id, s.subject_name, s.sort_order ORDER BY value DESC, s.sort_order ASC LIMIT 7

SELECT s.subject_name AS label, COALESCE(ROUND(AVG(es.correct_count / es.total_problem_count * 100), 1), 0) AS value, COALESCE(ROUND(AVG(es.correct_count / es.total_problem_count * 100), 1), 0) AS percent FROM subjects s LEFT JOIN exam_sessions es ON s.subject_id = es.subject_id AND es.submitted_at IS NOT NULL AND DATE(es.submitted_at) >=
DATE_SUB(STR_TO_DATE(DATE_FORMAT(CURDATE(), '%Y-%m-01'), '%Y-%m-%d'), INTERVAL 4 MONTH)
DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 4 DAY)
WHERE s.is_active = 1 GROUP BY s.subject_id, s.subject_name, s.sort_order ORDER BY value DESC, s.sort_order ASC LIMIT 7

SELECT DATE_FORMAT(stats.stat_date, '%Y-%m-%d') AS statDate, s.subject_name AS subjectName, SUM(stats.learning_count) AS learningCount, SUM(stats.submission_count) AS submissionCount, SUM(stats.exam_attempt_count) AS examAttemptCount, COALESCE(ROUND(AVG(stats.average_score), 1), 0) AS averageScore FROM ( SELECT DATE(COALESCE(updated_at, created_at)) AS stat_date, subject_id, COUNT(*) AS learning_count, 0 AS submission_count, 0 AS exam_attempt_count, NULL AS average_score FROM learning_progress WHERE DATE(COALESCE(updated_at, created_at)) >=
DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 6 DAY) DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 29 DAY) DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 2 DAY)
GROUP BY DATE(COALESCE(updated_at, created_at)), subject_id
UNION ALL
SELECT DATE(ps.created_at) AS stat_date, psa.subject_id, 0 AS learning_count, COUNT(*) AS submission_count, 0 AS exam_attempt_count, NULL AS average_score FROM practice_submissions ps JOIN practice_set_attempts psa ON ps.set_attempt_id = psa.set_attempt_id WHERE DATE(ps.created_at) >=
DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 6 DAY) DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 29 DAY) DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 2 DAY)
GROUP BY DATE(ps.created_at), psa.subject_id
UNION ALL
SELECT DATE(submitted_at) AS stat_date, subject_id, 0 AS learning_count, 0 AS submission_count, COUNT(*) AS exam_attempt_count, AVG(correct_count / total_problem_count * 100) AS average_score FROM exam_sessions WHERE submitted_at IS NOT NULL AND DATE(submitted_at) >=
DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 6 DAY) DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 29 DAY) DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 2 DAY)
GROUP BY DATE(submitted_at), subject_id ) stats JOIN subjects s ON stats.subject_id = s.subject_id
WHERE s.subject_name = #{subject}
GROUP BY stats.stat_date, s.subject_id, s.subject_name, s.sort_order ORDER BY stats.stat_date DESC, s.sort_order ASC LIMIT 10
